subject: Release 5.1.1
commit_message:
Release 5.1.1

Do the release 5.1.1 to deliver new containers with new image (integration one based alpine-JDK 11)

Issue-ID: CLAMP-949
Signed-off-by: sebdet <sebastien.determe@intl.att.com>
Change-Id: I91c3a0806d0d92469b10bf545f62e99d0b89eb39
